# SparkCreatives Inc

> SparkCreatives Inc is a 501(c)(3) public charity (EIN 33-4477854) that turns surplus into opportunity — transforming donated goods and creative materials into hands-on programs that help young people, families, and emerging creatives build confidence, skills, leadership, and sustainable pathways forward. Operating across Jacksonville, Florida and Cebu, Philippines.

## Programs

SparkCreatives runs four public programs that work together as one ecosystem (Spark Supply Network → Spark Boxes → Spark Labs → Spark Studio):

- [Spark Boxes](/programs/spark-boxes): Access. Curated boxes of useful supplies, school materials, creative tools, and essentials put directly into people's hands.
- [Spark Labs](/programs/spark-labs): Learning. Guided workshops and training experiences using donated and reclaimed materials.
- [Spark Studio](/programs/spark-studio): Growth. Mentorship, leadership, project development, and venture pathways for emerging creatives.
- [Spark Supply Network](/programs/spark-supply-network): Supply. Materials, goods, volunteer, and sustainability pipeline powering every SparkCreatives program.

## Get involved

- [Donate](/donate): Make a tax-deductible gift; sponsor a Spark Box or give to a specific program.
- [Get Involved](/get-involved): Donate goods, volunteer, host a Spark Lab, or partner with us.
- [Impact](/impact): Outputs, outcomes, equity, and 2026 goals.
- [About](/about): Mission, story, leadership, and 501(c)(3) governance.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the team.

## Notes

- Aethelo is internal operations and impact infrastructure, not a public program.
- Some figures and details are being re-verified before launch and are marked accordingly on the site.
- Contact: hello@sparkcreativesinc.org
